Headline: #63 63rd Temporary Eastbound Reroute near 63rd/Blackstone
ShortDescription: EB 63 63rd buses are temporarily rerouted, due to police activity near 63rd/Blackstone.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #63 63rd buses are temporarily rerouted via 63rd, Dorchester, 60th, Stony Island, then resume their normal route on 63rd, due to police activity near 63rd/Blackstone.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
